creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Raphael Kubo da Costa from comment #3)
> Err, I meant "it failed to build for me".

Hello, Raphael.
Thank you very much for the feedback. It took me all
day yesterday to get FreeBSD to install on my spare
(and only) i386. I'll do some additional testing
later today, after I finish getting 9-STABLE setup
on that box.

Thanks again.

--Chris
